targets.query: from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "critical_count" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "warning_count" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -2m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "is_reachable" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> last()

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "critical_count" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last)

from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "warning_count" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: last)
from(bucket: "netdata") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "node_status" and r._field == "is_reachable" and r.node_name == "${node}") |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: last)

message: Node detail dashboard with variable selector
